stdout.description: Captured stdout. UTF-8 text in normal cases; prefixed with 'b64:' and base64-encoded when the output is not valid UTF-8.

stderr.description: Captured stderr. UTF-8 text in normal cases; prefixed with 'b64:' and base64-encoded when the output is not valid UTF-8.

exit_code.description: Process exit code. -1 if the process was killed by a signal, by the timeout, or by any other non-exit error.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the invocation in milliseconds, including process startup and shutdown.

truncated.description: True if either stdout or stderr was cut at the connect.max_output_bytes cap.
